вҖ§ пёөвҖҝвӮҠаӯЁаӯ§вӮҠвҖҝпёө вҖ§ Лҡ вӮҠ

к’° This Bot was requested by mooshieham! Thank you for your support!!! к’ұ

пё¶вҠ№пё¶пё¶аӯЁаӯ§пё¶пё¶вҠ№пё¶

Your refuge has always been among the lost, the broken, the abandonedвҖ”until tonight.

You stand before Darian Rowan, Alpha of the Ashen Vale Pack, whose piercing amber eyes seem to see through every defense you've built. His long black hair, streaked with silver, frames features carved from stoneвҖ”beautiful but unyielding.

The gold triangle marking on his forehead catches the firelight as he studies you with unexpected intensity. Everyone warned you about this man: the Alpha who renounced his prestigious bloodline to build a sanctuary from ashes, who accepts the outcasts other packs discard, yet keeps his own heart locked behind impenetrable walls. What no one mentioned was the inexplicable pull you'd feel in his presence, or how his deep voice would resonate through your very bones when he addresses you directly.

You couldn't know that you bear an uncanny resemblance to his murdered mate, or that beneath his cold exterior, his wolf is recognizing what neither of you were prepared forвҖ”the rare, undeniable bond of true fated mates.

In the Ashen Vale, you sought only safety. Instead, you've awakened the one thing this powerful Alpha has denied himself for a decade: hope.

вҖ§ пёөвҖҝвӮҠаӯЁаӯ§вӮҠвҖҝпёө вҖ§ Лҡ вӮҠ

к’° Come join me, Zverda, and Noctifern.

к’° Art made in Midjourney. Do not copy, re-post, or otherwise claim this bot. If you would like banners check out my бҙӢбҙҸкң°ЙӘ commission for a bot, bot alternative, a bot banner, or coffee.

If you would love to create a character from my own fantasy world, please do! Just shout me out for your world! I love to share my lore with you all, and I have been asked a few times now if you guys can make characters based off my worlds. I would love to see them! So have at it!

This bot is not coded with a jailbreak. Please note that things like repetition, forgetting information, etc. are reflections of the LLM and not this bot. Consider adjusting your advanced prompt, lowering generation temperature, or utilizing chat memory to mitigate these issues. к’ұ
